name: Heavenly Delight Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Vanilla Extract or almond extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Lightly grease the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Sprinkle the graham cracker curls over the bottom and dust, removing excess crumbs.
4. Place cottage cheese in a blender container; cover and blend until smooth.
5. Beat cottage cheese, Neufchatel cheese, sugar, and flour together at medium speed with an electric mixer until well combined.
6. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in milk and extract.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 40 minutes or until the center is almost set. Turn off the oven and allow the cheesecake to cool with the heat on. Loosen the cake from the rim if necessary. Refrigerate at least 2 hours (overnight is best).
9. Serve this light, low-fat dessert with fresh fruit.
